name: Atlinks Group Limited
summary: Atlinks Group Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, and sells home and office telecommunication products to retailers, telecommunication operators, and distributors worldwide. The company develops and distributes telephones, monitoring solutions, baby monitors, and conferencing phones under the Alcatel brand; and landline phones, smart home accessories, mobile phones, and various services to support and reassure senior users under the Swissvoice brand. It also provides sound telephones, headphones, accessories, and mobile phones under the Amplicomms brand. In addition, the company develops and trades in electrical equipment, including radio communication equipment; and manages trademarks. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong. Atlinks Group Limited is a subsidiary of Eiffel Global Limited.
